title: Evangelion Motorcycle
wikitext:

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Jun 30, 2010 2:35 am And we're supposed to assume that the horn on the front is aerodynamic or something? The Gainax Sponsorship Cow strikes again.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jun 30, 2010 2:53 am EvangelionFan wrote: And we're supposed to assume that the horn on the front is aerodynamic or something? The Gainax Sponsorship Cow strikes again.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Jun 30, 2010 5:11 am Oh, my bad. It actually looks really good without the horn. Not that I know any motorcycle drivers off-hand, but has it been said who will be driving the motorcycle in the races? I wonder if the drivers' helmet will have a matching Unit 01 paint scheme...

[]:             Quote Post by The Fourth Evangelion » Wed Jun 30, 2010 7:55 am Maybe a suit colored like Shinji's.... It looks pretty awesome, but I hope it can go berserk...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Wed Jun 30, 2010 9:47 am Badass just got a new level of win.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jun 30, 2010 11:19 am EvangelionFan wrote: Oh, my bad. It actually looks really good without the horn. Not that I know any motorcycle drivers off-hand, but has it been said who will be driving the motorcycle in the races? I wonder if the drivers' helmet will have a matching Unit 01 paint scheme...

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed Jun 30, 2010 12:54 pm 武石伸也 - Shinya Takeishi 芹沢太麻樹 - Tamaki Serizawa 今野由寛 - Yoshihiro Konno

[]:             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Jun 30, 2010 2:18 pm That's gotta look pretty epic flying down the course in the middle of a race.
